name: GladMort
short_description: In a faraway kingdom in a land of legend, a mysterious plague of unknown origin has rapidly infected the population. Dubbed the "Red Plague", the evil nature of the phenomenon is unmistakable: the dead begin to rise from their graves, and demonic incarnations begin to appear.
detailed_description:
Relive the golden age of arcade games with a brutal… and unforgettable challenge.

GladMort arrives on PC! Discover a medieval fantasy action-platformer designed for NEO GEO and inspired by the classics of its era. This game was fully funded in just 24 hours by 862 passionate fans through a crowdfunding campaign. A huge thank you to them!

Do you have what it takes to face a game as ruthless as it is legendary?


GladMort awaits… and so does death.

📜 KEY FEATURES 📜

✔ A merciless challenge – An old-school gameplay experience with no concessions: every mistake has a price. Only the most tenacious will reach the end!

✔ 5 deadly levels – Unique environments filled with relentless enemies and diabolical traps. Memory and reflexes will be your only weapons.

✔ A versatile arsenal – Axes, spears, flails… Each weapon has its own strengths and weaknesses. Master your style and dominate your enemies!

✔ Authentic pixel art – Meticulously crafted graphics and animations, faithful to the NEO GEO spirit.

✔ Epic OST – A powerful, immersive soundtrack that fuels every battle and heightens the tension.

📜 STORY 📜

Evil has awakened. The dead walk once more. The kingdom is in flames...

A dark curse has swept across the land, raising the dead and corrupting the souls of the living. Infernal lords and demonic creatures march forward relentlessly, leaving only ruins and despair in their wake.

In this chaos, one last hope remains: GladMort.

A cursed knight, master of ancient relics, has forged a dark pact to face the army of the damned. Armed with supernatural powers, he embarks on a heroic… yet damned quest.

His goal: trace the source of evil and eradicate it before humanity falls forever.

📜 GAMEPLAY 📜 

🔥 An action-platformer built for true players! 🔥

⚔️ Strike, dodge, survive – Fight through 5 treacherous levels filled with ruthless enemies and deadly traps. Each environment will test your skill and endurance.

A hardcore survival system:

  • First hit → You lose your armor and fight in your underwear!

  • Second hit → Death… and a return to the beginning of the level (or a checkpoint, if you reached one).

💀 No room for error – Every level is a test of reflexes and strategy. Die, and you start over… again and again.

🎁 Loot hidden treasures – Recover lost armor, uncover powerful weapons, and prepare for the ultimate battle.

But who is GladMort, truly?

The fate of the kingdom now rests in your hands...

🔥 Face the challenge. Become GladMort. 🔥
